desc: Full Stack web application development with Next.js, React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS on the frontend.
Backend with Django and Django REST Framework; implementation and consumption of REST APIs.
Complete integration between frontend and backend with PostgreSQL database.
Use of Docker in a pre-configured environment for development standardization.
Participation in bug fixes, evolutionary improvements and maintenance of existing systems.
Collaboration with the team on code versioning (Git/GitHub) and best practices.
Development of an educational web platform using Django and REST APIs.
Implementation of features, performance testing and accessibility improvements.
Production of didactic Java and MySQL courses with practical examples and interactive exercises.
Mentoring of interns, code review and technical quality assurance of materials.
